item.title: Teste

item.title: cbt
item.description: Judith S. Beck Phd - Cognitive Behavior Therapy_ Basics and Beyond, Second Edition -The Guilford Press (2011) antiga cognitive therapy agora cognitive behavior therapy effectiveness post-traumatic stress disorder, obsessive-compulsive disorder, phobias of all kinds, and eating disorders. Can be paired up with medication to help the treatment of bipolar disorder and schizophrenia. It is also beneficial in a wide variety of chronic medical disorders such as low back pain, colitis (?

item.title: flow
item.description: flow phenomenology of enjoyment 1 the experience usually occurs when we confront tasks we have a chance of completing 2 we must be able to concentrate on what we are doing 3/4 concentration is usually possible because the task undertaken has clear goals and provides immediate feedback 5 one acts with a deep but effortless involvement that removes from awareness the worries and frustrations of everyday life

item.title: flow
item.description: flow phenomenology of enjoyment 1 the experience usually occurs when we confront tasks we have a chance of completing 2 we must be able to concentrate on what we are doing 3/4 concentration is usually possible because the task undertaken has clear goals and provides immediate feedback 5 one acts with a deep but effortless involvement that removes from awareness the worries and frustrations of everyday life

item.title: Machine Learning
item.description: primeira semana o que é machine learning? He says, a computer program is said to learn from experience E with respect to some task T and some performance measure P, if its performance on T, as measured by P, improves with experience E. Ele diz que um programa de computador aprende com uma experiência E em relação a uma tarefa T e uma medida de performance P, se sua performance em T, medida por P, melhora com a experiência E.
